summary: Consensus guidelines for transparent, reproducible qPCR: RNA quality, primer validation, reference genes, statistical analysis.

title: Quantitative western blot for tight-junction proteins (claudin-1, occludin, ZO-1)
summary: Optimised western blot protocol for membrane-bound tight-junction proteins: lysate preparation, transfer, densitometric quantification.

summary: Quantitative sandwich ELISA with biotin-streptavidin detection; linear range, blocking, and CV optimisation.

summary: Slow-cooling cryopreservation protocol for adherent and suspension mammalian cells, with post-thaw viability assays.

title: Cyclic voltammetry: methodology for electrochemical characterisation
summary: General CV protocol covering electrolyte preparation, three-electrode setup, scan-rate selection, and data interpretation.

summary: Anaerobic two-chamber MES reactor build, cathode preparation, S. ovata inoculation, and acetate quantification.

title: Antibody-functionalised screen-printed electrode immunosensor fabrication
summary: Protocol for SAM-based antibody immobilisation on gold screen-printed electrodes with EIS and CV characterisation.

summary: Step-by-step lateral flow strip assembly with colloidal gold conjugation and test/control line optimisation.

title: Routine HeLa cell culture and subculturing
summary: EMEM + 10% FBS, subculture at 80% confluence with 0.25% trypsin-EDTA, freeze in 90% medium + 10% DMSO.

summary: Daily oral gavage protocol for live Lactobacillus species (1e8–1e9 CFU) in C57BL/6 mice, with welfare considerations.

title: DSS-induced colitis mouse model
summary: Standardised DSS dosing, water administration, and disease activity index scoring for mouse colitis studies.

summary: Ion-exclusion HPLC with refractive index detection for SCFA quantification from microbial cultures and gut samples.

title: ARRIVE 2.0 guidelines for in vivo experiment design and reporting
summary: Sample size justification, randomisation, blinding, and reporting standards for animal experiments.
